MyVolts 9V Power Supply Adaptor Compatible with/Replacement for Casio CTK-450 Keyboard - US Plug
["Need to power your CTK-450? The item we offer here is a myVolts-branded compatible power supply that can be used as a replacement for the AC adapter originally supplied with your CTK-450 Keyboard.This 9V high-quality replacement power adapter from myVolts is guaranteeed to be compatible with the Casio CTK-450 Keyboard.The plug fits a US 2-pin wall power socket.This power adaptor is designed to meet the power specification of the CTK-450 Keyboard - correct voltage, amperage and tip size.It meets and exceeds all US safety standard, features overvoltage, overcurrent and short circuit protection to protect your device, and is energy efficient.Power cord lost or broken, and you're not sure what you need?Get in touch with myVolts through Amazon, and we'll help - we've 15 years in the power game, know all the devices, and we love to help our customers get exactly the item they need to solve their power problem."]
['This 9V high-quality replacement power adapter is compatible with the Casio CTK-450 Keyboard.', 'The plug fits a US 2-pin wall power socket.', 'This power adaptor is designed to meet the power specification of the CTK-450 Keyboard referred to here - it is the correct voltage, amperage and tip size.', 'It meets and exceeds all US safety standard, features overvoltage, overcurrent and short circuit protection to protect your device, and is energy efficient.']

Hot Wheels Color Crashers Cyber Speeder, Motorized Toy Car with Lights & Sounds, Blue, by Just Play
['Ready, set, race! Kids will love racing the Hot Wheels Color Crashers Cyber Speeder vehicle! Each large scale, 10-inch long motorized vehicle features bright colors and custom Hot Wheels decals. Kids can press the button on the roof and watch their vehicle speed off! When the car makes impact with a wall, another toy, or anything at all, it will trigger a cool crash light sequence and epic crashing sounds! Color Crashers even feature realistic vehicle sounds and music! Kids can collect all the Hot Wheels Color Crashers vehicles for ultimate races and crashes with their friends! Requires 3 x AA batteries (included). Ages 3+']
['Includes: 1 vehicle.', 'From the dragstrip to your home, get ready for high-octane fun with the Hot Wheels Color Crashers Cyber Speeder vehicle.', 'This epic, large-scale Hot Wheels race car features motorized drive, flashing lights, realistic racing sounds, and rockin’ music.', 'Press the button on the roof to launch Cyber Speeder into action! Watch the roaring dragster speed away — a crash will trigger a colorful light show and intense crashing sounds.', 'The Hot Wheels Color Crashers Cyber Speeder vehicle is 10 inches long, and sports a blue body with rad racing decals.', 'Collect all the Hot Wheels Color Crashers cars for the ultimate Hot Wheels drag-racing experience!', 'Each sold separately.']

iCradle Realistic Newborn Baby Dolls Full Body Silicone Simulation 22 Inch Lifelike Reborn Baby Doll That Look Real Life Reborn Bebe Dolls Toddler Girl Anatomically Correct
['Get Ready to Love Your Unique, Reborn Doll', 'Our Promise to You: Realistic Reborns & Lifelike Living Dolls We', '"iCradle"', 'care about quality, our customers, and our dolls. Our reborn dolls are made to order and hand painted with love by the iCradle team. iCradle reborn dolls are weighted, with soft skin to ensure each of our collectable dolls are as realistic as possible. We offer affordable and lifelike reborn dolls, suitable for children and adults alike. These reborn baby dolls make the perfect gift for a doll collector or to add to your own doll collection. They are also perfect therapy for sufferers of Dementia/Alzheimers as bring great comfort.', 'Baby Doll Details', "❤ Size: approx. 22 Inch / 55 cm. ❤ Net Weight: weighs approx. 1.5KG, 3.3LBS. ❤ Hair: The reborn toddler doll comes with manually rooted brown fiber hair, very realistic and lifelike. ❤ Body: She comes with full body, you can put her in water. ❤ Eyes: Her big charmy eyes are hand applied, eyes are made of artificaial clear acrylic eyes, eyes can't close and blink. ❤ Nail: Completely hand-drawn nails, redness of the nail bed and translucent nails, and even some nails life milky a half of moon shape. ❤ Scent: A soft baby powder scent, the scent of the baby comes from the Vinyl material, non-toxic and eco-friendly. ❤ Recommended Age: 3+", 'You will get:', '❤Reborn toddler doll x 1;❤Doll outfit x1;❤Magnet pacifier x1;❤Feeding Bottle x1;❤Diaper x1;❤Birth Certificate x1.Reborn baby dolls are committed to bring people a joyful and meaningful gift, which could accompany you growth. With such hope, we made a quality exquisite dolls for you. Now this cute girl baby doll is here waiting for you to bring her to a lovely home!!! Thank you for your shopping with us!']
['Size: approx.22inch / 55cm. Net weight is around 1.5kg, 3.3lbs, the reborn toddler girl doll is handmade, there will be some difference in size and weight. This beautiful real life reborn baby girl doll can fit into newborn 0-3 months real baby clothes, you can change clothes for her.', 'This real life reborn baby doll is made from non-scented and washable vinyl, which means the doll is soft and smooth to touch, yet durable for years. This reborn little girl baby doll is a realistically looking real girl newborn doll that perfectly captures bringing a baby home from the nursery. The bebe doll has a soft and gentle smiling face with bright happy eyes and irresistibly cute toes.', 'This realistic silicone full body reborn baby doll is not only a good playmate for toddlers, but also a collectable reborn baby doll for doll collectors.It is totally poseable, head and limbs can be moved around freely. When you put her in your arms and hold her, it feels like you are holding a real baby, kids can hand her to everywhere too. This lifelike newborn baby doll is anatomically correct, has girl gential. You can put her into water to bath.', "The newborn look baby doll has jointed at the shoulders, hips, and neck, so you can rotate the legs and arms when adding and removing doll's clothing, and turn her head side to side during play.", 'Package includes: 1 x Reborn Doll Girl, 1 x brand new clothes, 1 x Magnet Pacifier, 1 x Nursing Bottle, 1 x Diaper, 1 x Birth Certificate.']

Large Dinosaur Stuffed Animal Plush Pillow for Kids – Soft & Squishy Cute Dino Nap Buddy – Skin-Friendly, Portable, and Stress-Relief Travel Pillow
['Are you looking for the perfect cuddle buddy for your child to keep them company while they sleep? Have you checked out our giant stuffed animal pillow dinosaur plush toy? Experience superior comfort and unmatched softness that will allow you to enjoy some cozy time snuggling in bed. This plush toy pillow is a great way to give your friend a fluffy friend to play with and help them develop essential life skills. White Reindeer
['Product Description', 'White Reindeer is a new holiday tradition based on gift exchange games like White Elephant. Gather your friends and family around a pile of gifts and take turns playing cards that let you steal from others, block or intercept those steals, lock in your gifts and much more. Gone are the days of coming up with house rules to balance things out. Gone are the days of hoping someone will free you from your gift while you sit around unable to do anything. In White Reindeer, turns move fast and everyone has a fair shot at getting the gift they want if they play their cards right.', 'From the Manufacturer', '$3,065 raised with 74 backers. How To Play White Reindeer', "The game is simple. Everyone is dealt three cards and on their turn, they can either play a card or draw back up to three. If you see a gift you want that someone else has, play a steal card to take it from them. If you've made it around to your turn and you like the gift in front of you, play Lock it In to keep your gift and finish the game. The game comes to an end when there's one gift left in the middle. Each player gets one more turn, then everyone locks in their gift.", 'Play the "Ho Ho Ho" expansion for a more spirited game!', 'The "Ho Ho Ho" expansion adds ten new cards to the game that are appropriate for all ages, but more fun for adults. The "Mistletoe" card lets you steal a kiss from another player in addition to your gift. The titular "Ho Ho Ho" card has you playing Santa and giving a gift to the nicest or naughtiest player. And the "Christmas Cheer" card goes well with a nice glass of hot buttered rum or some eggnog (spiked or not, depending on the folks you\'re playing with).', 'Claim, Steal, Lock It In!', 'Most of the cards in the deck are either a "Claim" card that lets you select a gift from the middle, a "Steal" card that lets you steal from another player, or a "Lock It In" card that lets you lock your gift in and finish the game. Some of these basic cards also include instructions like singing, dancing, or drawing extra cards.', 'Special Cards', "Beyond the basic cards, there are cards that let you block steals, intercept steals, or draw cards. There's even a card that lets you play one round of a regular White Elephant game just in case you're feeling nostalgic.", 'The White Reindeer Card', 'Our favorite card, though, is the "White Reindeer" card. This card is optional, but if you choose to play with it, it allows one player to go home with the game itself as their gift. The holidays are all about sharing, and if you don\'t mind spreading the joy, this card can add an extra level of fun to the party.', "If it's broke, fix it.", "White Elephant gifts exchanges are a whole lot of fun, but the rules are just terrible. We aimed to remedy that. And we've succeeded. For the last five years, my family has enjoyed White Reindeer as their gift exchanging holiday tradition. And two years ago, I used the game to propose to my wife. While the game is speci
['Holiday gift exchange', 'Players put wrapped gifts in the middle and play cards to steal them from one another', 'Includes "ho ho ho" expansion for a more spirited game', 'Perfect stocking stuffer', '5-12 Players recommended, up to 24 with two copies']

Istanbul Mehmet Cymbals Traditional Series CH20 20-Inch China Cymbals
['The Traditional Series sound is suited for pretty much every style of music imaginable. The classic concept of these fully lathed cymbals has proven its value through the years. From the earliest jazz drummers and bebop pioneers, to heavy metal and the latest stylistic evolutions, the Traditional Series encompasses the sounds you’re looking for. Dark. Responsive. Controllable. Musical. ABOUT  MEHMET - Mehmet Tamdeger learned his art from Mikhail Zilcan, the grandson of Kerope Zilcan, after whom the Zilcan K series is named. In the 1950s, he worked in the K. Zilcan factory in Istanbul. At the age of nine Mehmet Tamdeğer started to work for Mikhail Zilcan. Mikhail Zilcan and Kirkor Küçükyan taught him every aspect of this ancient Turkish art, based on a history that stems back to the early 17th century. The Istanbul brand name was adopted by a cymbal works established by two cymbalsmiths, Mehmet Tamdeger and Agop Tomurcuk. At that time, they had over three decades of cymbal making experience. Mehmet and Agop named their company after the city that has been home to the epitome of high quality cymbals for many, many years: Istanbul. These cymbals were first exported to the U.S. in 1984, first under the name "Zildjiler", and soon afterwards as "Istanbul". Both craftsmen signed each cymbal and many of these cymbals are now collectors\' items. After Agop Tomurcuk\' s unexpected death in July 1996, Mehmet decided to continue the production of cymbals under his own name, İstanbul Mehmet. A lot has changed since then, but his belief in the richness and the character of a handmade cymbal will always remain. Machines don\'t have ears. That\'s why we continue to make our cymbals according to the ancient tradition - with an open eye towards the music that\'s being made now, and in the future.']

['Drive fearlessly and punch that throttle! The MAMBA  X 8S W/1520-1650kv  COMBO is intended for use in 1/6, 1/7 and 1/8 scale vehicles weighing up to 18 lbs. and running up to 8s LiPo. You’ll put more power to the ground, where it should be, instead of wasting it through raw heat and RPMs. The 4-pole 12-slot 1520-1650kv sensored motor design boast exceptional efficiency, and the oversized NMB bearings and vibration dampening system ensure the longest bearing life possible. High-strength, high-temperature grade neodymium sintered magnets combined with a high-strength Kevlar wrap ensures the integrity of the rotor is not compromised during harsh running conditions. You will reap the benefits of longer run times on one battery and a cooler running motor that can be pushed harder. The MAMBA  X 8S utilizes Castle’s breakthrough technology CRYO-DRIVE™. By reducing the rate at which the ESC heats up and removing heat more efficiently, your setup will be able to handle higher gear ratios, in heavier vehicles, with longer runs. These software advancements work in parallel with a unique open housing design to allow increased directional airflow to cool critical components. With the integration of a 40mm cooling fan and a forged elliptical fin heatsink, the design maximizes airflow throughout the system, taking thermal performance to a whole new level. High-performance demands high quality and this ESC was designed with durability in mind. Constructed around a robust aluminum casing, the epoxy potting guarantees protection around the circuitry and ensures all-weather use. Cort Standard Series AF510 Acoustic Guitar, Concert Body, Open Pore Natural
['Cort’s oldest acoustic series, the Standard Series defines superb performance and value for the money. The Standard Series guitars are affordable but offer good solid performance for beginners and hobbyists alike in a variety of models with different types of features for any playing situation. AF510 concert body acoustic features Spruce top, Mahogany back and sides, Merbau fingerboard. The Concert body size is smaller and produces a more focused and balanced sound than the Dreadnaught with less emphasis on the bass and a strong midrange with clearer and sweeter highs. This sonic balance of the Concert body makes it ideal for fingerpicking as well as solo single-note playing. Spruce provides an ideal balance between strength and flexibility, hence its overwhelming popularity as the wood of choice for tops of acoustic guitars. Spruce’s versatile sonic character makes it ideal for a variety of musical genres and playing styles. Bright yet natural with a strong and warm midrange, the beloved mahogany wood has been a standard for back and sides on premium acoustics for many decades. Strongly joined with meticulous workmanship by experienced craftsmen, the dovetail joint transfers the body’s vibration and resonance to the neck with no loss of energy and with plenty of detail. High-quality coating on the strings resist humidity, dirt and sweat for long string life and improved playability. Specially outfitted on this model. The exclusive scooped surface bridge from Cort enhances sustain with greater string angle from the saddle to the body while reducing tension on the strings across the neck were less finger fatigue and improved playability. Afterlife (Jewel Case)
['As the regional spiritual director (Demiurge), your task in Afterlife is to provide a world in which the recently deceased can "live" until their final resting place, heaven or hell, is decided. The game, written in a humorous vein, is a non-linear world-building simulation. Creation of the Afterlife world involves developing real estate on two planes simultaneously. The game features more than 200 "rewards and punishments" to be given to your population and close to 300 detailed and specific building tiles used during the creation process. To deal with the learning curve, Afterlife has a built-in tutorial in which two mentors guide you by providing information to make your transition from ordinary game player to Demiurge easier. These two guides, Aria and Jasper, work for the top bosses in heaven and hell respectively and each slants their spiel toward the two locations in question. Other features in Afterlife include random disaster events, maps, charts and graphs to keep track of the action. The interface is mouse driven and utilizes a detailed menu system for executing game tasks.']

Scene It ? TV Edition Game
['Product description', 'With 50 years of TV packed into one game, Scene It? Deluxe TV Edition is the quintessential television trivia game. From Leave it to Beaver and The Brady Bunch to Alias and Malcolm in the Middle, Scene It? TV Edition will keep players tuning in for hours of TV entertainment.', 'Amazon.com', 'Put all those hours of vegging in front of the tube to good use with this interactive game that challenges your knowledge of TV trivia. Players pick a token with couch potato-inspired design and move it around a reel-shaped board, answering questions all the way, in a quest to reach the board’s bulls-eye center and be named the ultimate channel surfer. An 8-sided die determines whether players will answer a trivia question from the pack of cards or from a clip on the DVD—or pick up a Buzz card, which impacts your performance either positively (for example, sending you ahead a few spaces for successfully pitching a new series) or negatively (holding you back for bombing your', 'American Idol', 'tryout). Answering questions correctly lets players move on while incorrect responses force players to end their turn. For variety, the trivia cards offer 1,200 questions divided into three types of challenges where players identify an actor or show based on three provided clues; recall soundtracks, slogans, or catch phrases; or answer pop culture questions. The DVD features over 206 different television show clips and images, which are randomized so no two games are the same. This edition is for two to four players or teams and comes with an expanding board that can open out for longer games or fold in for quicker play. Scene It? was awarded the Game of the Year at the 2005 Toy of the Year Awards.', '--Cristina Vaamonde']
['Toy of the Year Game Winner!', 'Optreve technology randomizes TV clips for a different game every time you play.', 'Flextime board can be folded for shorter games.', 'More than 206+ TV show clips and images, 250 stars and 1200 trivia questions!']

["The Vater brand was officially established in November of 1991, but the Vater family history with drumsticks started decades earlier, in the basement of Boston's legendary Jack's Drum Shop. A few years of this led to the brothers deciding to move their business to a new factory in Holbrook MA. Over the past decade, the Vater family and product line has expanded greatly, introducing innovative products such as the Splash Stick and Acoustic, and welcoming renowned drummers like Chad Smith, Stewart Copeland, and Josh Freeze. ["4D Cityscape is a patented, multi-layer puzzle that is fun, challenging, and educational. Assemble the first two layers of the puzzle to form a map of the city's streets, islands, roads, railways, parks, and geography. When the base layers are complete, you're ready for a trip through history! The ultimate collector puzzle for the ultimate game of Thrones fan! With over 891 pieces, You assemble this amazing puzzle of Westeros & Essos. The first layer puzzle is a generic jigsaw of the two famous continents. The second foam layer puzzle you assemble the famous introduction of the Hbo TV series. The third layer you add 3D Miniature models of cities and castles which is a complete miniature Model of the world of game of Thrones! What is the 4th dimension? The 4th dimension is time, located on the third layer of the puzzle. You refer to the time poster to locate and place each building on the map according to the year It was built. As you work your way through the time poster you are placing each building in chronological order as if history is happening before you eyes! The year of the last building placed on the map represents the year you are in the puzzle. Learn how a city develops and evolves. Explore historic buildings and architectural styles. ['Look out! Here come 5 incredible dinosaur toys that look like the real thing! Ceratosaurus lived during the Jurassic period (roughly 199. 6 million to 145. 5 million years ago). This fearsome carnivore had long fangs, 3 horns on its face, and bony armor along its spine. Ceratosaurus also had stubby arms, and each hand had four short fingers with small claws on the tips. Seydel Harmonica ()
[" S Session Steel Harmonica Key of Low D. The  S Session Steel Harmonica is a 10-hole, solo-tuned harmonica (orchestra-tuning). As with the chromatic harmonica, all notes from the major scale are available throughout a two-and-a-half octave range. The  S offers even more Typically, the root note is found in hole 1-blow. The  S places the root note at hole 3-blow, and half of the lower octave is added to holes 1 and 2. Since many players miss some of the notes on the standard Richter-tuned diatonic harmonica in the lower register the  S allows them to hit the missing notes without having to apply a bending technique. The root note of the diatonic major scale is marked on the coverplate - it starts in 3 blow. This makes the  S an ideal soloing instrument; the ten-hole design makes the Orchestra-S compact enough to take your melodies anywhere. The note layout is basically the same as that of a chromatic harmonica, making the  S a great starting harmonica for learning to play a chromatic. The compact size combined with SEYDEL's durability makes the  S a good choice for musical education in schools. The  S opens new possibilities to blues harmonica players by making it easy to play minor pieces (3rd position) with a sound similar to solos played on a chromatic, thanks to the solo-tuning. They will also appreciate the extended major scale in the lower register. The root note of the dominant chord is available in the hole 1-draw, making it similar to playing in 2nd position on a standard Richter-tuned harmonica. Seasoned blues players will find all the notes of the blues scale through natural notes and bent notes, bringing soul and color to their blues improvisation."]
['Solo-tuning in a ten-hole, compact harmonica', 'Expanded tonal range in the lower register (Orchestra tuning)', 'Stainless-steel reeds, coverplates, and screws combined for unparalleled durability (outlasting brass-reed models by up to five-times)', 'Anti-corrosive, German-silver reedplates', 'Lip-friendly, translucent carmine red plastic comb (ABS) with recessed reedplates']

Roosebeck DMCRT4 4-String Cutaway Mountain Dulcimer, F-Hole Openings and Scrolled Pegbox
['The Cutaway Dulcimer plays the same and sounds the same as a traditional mountain dulcimer. One side, however, is narrower which allows the dulcimer to be played in a "guitar position" in addition to the normal "lap position". Thus, the fingering is inverted from normal style. It is kind of a missing link between the traditional mountain dulcimer and our "stick style" Wildwood Dulcimer. The inverted fingerings are a little easier for guitar players but it still produces the rich, full sound of a mountain dulcimer. When you want to play in a traditional style, lay it flat and play it like any other mountain dulcimer. Many tunings will work, but we recommend the traditional DAD to makes it easy to pick up and play. The solid spruce soundboard features three "F-hole" openings. The back, sides, and fretboard, are rosewood. The fretboard has arches underneath allowing free space between the soundboard and the fretboard. The carved scroll peghead has geared 4:1 banjo style tuners. A pick and noter are included. Special Note: The strings put on the instruments in our workshop, while playable, are put through some rigorous testing. They should probably be replaced for improved playability, sound quality, and better tuning shortly after you receive the instrument. We recommend using Roosebeck branded strings.']
['Fun to play, easy to learn', 'Solid spruce soundboard for a warm tone', 'High quality banjo style tuners']

W. Britain 25040 U.S. 101st Airborne Infantry Wearing Overcoat Reaching for Ammo, Winter 1944-45
['In the fall of 1944, most allied soldiers predicted that the war in Europe would be over by Christmas. Fierce fighting was taking place along the German frontier at Aachen and the Hürtgen Forest and the collapse of the German Army in the west seemed imminent. But the German Army was still a foe to be respected and on the 16th of December, it launched a major counter offensive in the heavily wooded area of the Ardennes Belgium, France, and Luxembourg. In the early part of the offensive, the Germans managed to make deep penetrations into the U.S. defenses in that sector. The surprise attack caught the Allied forces completely off guard and it developed into the largest and bloodiest battle fought by the United States in World War II. By January 25th of 1945, the ‘Bulge’ in the allied lines had been completely reduced, severely depleting Germany’s armored forces on the Western Front, crippling their ability to resist the final Allied push to the Rhine. These newest World War II releases focus on this time period and will be developed in depth to allow the collector to represent any of the engagements in the closing days of war in Europe on the western front.']

ZVEX Effects Fuzz Factory Vexter Series Fuzz Guitar Pedal
['The Vexter Fuzz Factory from ZVex is a 5-knob fuzz pedal with 2 old-stock \'60s germanium transistors, and it comes in a hand-polished aluminum chassis with hand-silkscreened, 2-color text. The Vexter Fuzz Factory from ZVex is a 5-knob fuzz pedal with 2 NOS \'60s germanium transistors, and it comes in a hand-polished aluminum chassis with hand-silkscreened, 2-color text. Though the circuit isn\'t modeled after any one specific classic fuzz, it delivers tones straight out of the 1960s. These 5 knobs control the Fuzz Factory\'s parameters at various operating levels, letting you shape your own personalized fuzz effect. ZVex designed the Fuzz Factory to consume less energy than other effects pedals. When on, the Fuzz Factory\'s current is less than 3 mA. This fuzz pedal is hand-painted and assembled, and each is unique. Fuzz Factory Controls Volume: Output level Gate: Squelches noise after end of sustain. Turn to the right to eliminate squeals, hiss, and buzz, stopping just as they disappear, or use to tune in exact feedback pitch. Turning to the left opens gate. Compress: Adds attack characteristic when turned to the left, which gets softer to right, and suddenly pinches tone when all the way right. Also tunes in fat, feedbacky fuzz. Lower the Stability and see what happens to this control. Drive: Increases distortion when used as a "normal" fuzz and adjusts feedback pitch and tonal thickness. Stability: Use to control feedback pitch. This is one of the more finicky controls, so it will take some experimentation to get it right.']
["Made with 2 new old stock '60s germanium transistors", 'Volume, Gate, Compress controls', 'Drive, and Stability controls', 'Hand-silkscreened, hand-polished aluminum chassis', "Made with 2 new old stock '60s germanium transistors", 'Drive, and Stability controls', 'Hand-silkscreened, hand-polished aluminum chassis']

Hermetic Press Inc. Prism The Color Series of Mentalism by Max Maven - Book
['While a sizable literature devoted to mentalism was produced in the past hundred years, little has stood the test of time. Among the scant amount that has is that of MAX MAVEN. Writing under the name of Phil Goldstein, MAVEN has created one of the largest, cleverest and most influential bodies of work in the field, stretching from the latter part of the twentieth century into the twenty-first. His star rose early, with the publication of five slim collections, each packed with innovative and performance-caliber mentalism. These booklets, which have become widely known as "The Color Series," contained items such as "Desire", "The Spirit is Willing (to Write)" and "Four-sided Triangle" - items that have become modern classics in the field. MAVEN produced The Color Series booklets in small quantities and, despite ongoing popular request, refused to reprint them. They have become highly sought after, fetching prices in the hundreds of dollars. At last, after a quarter of a century, the entire Color Series is again available; all 53 effects, newly illustrated by Ton Onosaka, 240 pages in hardcover. Welcome to a classic reborn -', 'PRISM', '!', 'Pages 240', '- Hardbound We asked the top mentalists in the world if they wanted to say anything about it, and the response we got was overwhelming... "When I was a teenager, and I had to do 10 shows in 2 weeks, these books saved my life. I can tell you off the top of my head, I performed Desire, Chaos, Nucleus, Four-sided Triangle, there was Mental Telepathy. So, it\'s a brilliant, brilliant book. I\'m thrilled they\'re re-releasing this. I always say, when I see Max, \'Thank you for putting out these books, because they really did save my life.\' If you haven\'t read these, you\'ve got a treat. Get it while you can."', '- Steve Valentine', '"This is a']
